name: pe-fund-generic
description: Generic PE fund model — Assumptions, Cash Flows, Waterfall, IRR, Summary tabs

mappings._comment: Generic skeleton — cell refs should be filled in per-fund. These are examples only.

notes: For PE funds, fund-level metrics (TVPI, DPI, netIRR, vintageYear) typically sit on a Summary or Cover sheet.
Use 'ete manifest doctor' after init to catch missing fields, then 'ete manifest set' to fill them.
